column1: # NucleoOS partition table (8 MB flash). See docs/partition-table.md.
# factory 2.5 MB: it's the image flashed via serial (OTA is unreliable -> serial is the real path
# see serial-console-routing). Was 2 MB @ 30% free -> now ~44% free with the same image. OTA slots
# 2.25 MB each: still ample for the ~1.44 MB image (38% headroom) and the A/B + rollback scheme is
# fully preserved. nvs/otadata/nvs_keys/coredump/cfg KEEP their exact offsets so a cable reflash
# preserves Wi-Fi/pairing (nvs) and OS config (cfg). App region 0x20000..0x720000 stays full; end at 8 MB.
